section.title: NAME
section.p: splitAsync - Interview operation "db.collectionspace.collection.split" the same function, but it operates as an asynchronous partition operation, the task ID returned immediately after the partition created task.

body.section:
SYNOPSIS
db.collectionspace.collection. splitAsync(source group,target group,target group|cond,[endcondition])

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Interview operation "db.collectionspace.collection.split" the same function, but it operates as an asynchronous partition operation, the task ID returned immediately after the partition created task.
